pages.text: $(bold)Saguaro Cactus Seed$()$(br2)The badlands giant. Pressed from cactus + red sand.
pages.title: Saguaro Cactus Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant on sand to raise the dynamic saguaro.$(br2)$(bold)Make:$() $(italic)Cactus$() + $(italic)Red Sand$() → this seed. One-way; no sapling.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
